reviews.review_title: Jmancurly Sent Us But Its Fake
reviews.review_description: This is a fake version of RoboRun.  The real one has a yellow tower in the lobby.  Please try the correct one.  Thank you.

reviews.review_description: The game is a lot of fun, but we bought the mod menu, and none of the options seems to work.. I wonder if we are missing a way to turn them on. Any advice would be great.

developer_response.body: Working on an update right now.

reviews.review_description: This game is great! Obviously it’s still in development so it’s gonna be a bit smaller but it’s definitely worth a try. I met the owner and he is such a cool guy! He definitely is trying to improve the game and takes suggestions if you run into him. Overall it’s a 5/5 stars because I like it. And join the Discord!
